pairs.independence_basis: Different sample preparations, different transport protocols (four-probe resistivity vs XRD-coupled), different labs.
pairs.scientific_weight: Independent confirmation tightens the Tc estimate to within 0.5 K and rules out instrument-specific systematic bias on the ambient-pressure dome.
pairs.rationale: Both arrive at Tc ~ 39 K via experimentally independent pathways; treating as cross-validation rather than equivalence preserves the independence axis for downstream weighting.
